basic_details.job_title: CMRL Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Manager, General Manager and More Posts
basic_details.total_vacancies: CGM, GM, JGM (Architect), DGM (Finance & Accounts), Manager (Architect)
basic_details.short_information: Chennai Metro Rail Limited (CMRL) is a joint venture of the Government of India and the Government of Tamil Nadu, responsible for implementing the Metro Rail Project in Chennai. Below is a quick overview table of the CMRL Recruitment 2026 notification.

important_dates.raw: Notification Release Date: 01 July 2026 Online Application Start Date: 01 July 2026 Last Date to Submit Online Application: 20 July 2026 Eligibility (age, qualification, experience) to be reckoned as on: 01 July 2026

application_fee.details: Application fee is applicable only for candidates applying for contract-type appointment (not applicable for deputation). | Unreserved and Other Category candidates: Rs. 300/- (non-refundable) SC/ST candidates: Rs. 50/- (non-refundable, for processing charge) Differently Abled Persons: No application fee (only disability certificate needs to be uploaded) | Fee must be paid via NEFT/UPI to the following account, and the payment receipt must be uploaded in the online application: | Fee once paid is non-refundable under any circumstances, so candidates should verify their eligibility before making the payment.

age_limit.details: The maximum age limit for each post is reckoned as on 01-07-2026, the date of the notification: | Chief General Manager / General Manager (Electrical Systems & Rolling Stock): 55 years Joint General Manager (Architect): 43 years Deputy General Manager (Finance & Accounts): 40 years Manager (Architect): 38 years | SC / SC (Arunthathiyars) / ST candidates: 5 years relaxation MBC / Denotified Communities / BC (non-Muslim) / BC (Muslim) candidates: 2 years relaxation Differently Abled Persons: up to 10 years relaxation over the prescribed limit (for direct recruitment only) Ex-Servicemen: prescribed age limit plus length of service in armed forces plus 3 years | In all cases, the maximum age after cumulative relaxation cannot exceed 58 years as on the date of notification.

qualification.details: CMRL has laid out separate eligibility criteria for candidates coming from Government organizations, Metro/PSU organizations, and the Private Sector. A summary is given below. | Govt Organization: Officer with 5 years' service in Senior Administrative Grade (SAG) in Railways/equivalent in GoI, or 5 years as Chief Engineer in State Govt organizations. Metro/PSU: Minimum 25 years post-qualification executive experience with at least 3 years as GM in IDA pay scale Rs. 1,20,000-2,80,000 or equivalent. Private Sector: Minimum 25 years post-qualification executive experience with at least 3 years in top management reporting directly to a Director or Board, in a company with project size of at least Rs. 500 crore or turnover of at least Rs. 100 crore in the last 3 years. | Govt Organization: IRSEE officer with 5 years' service in SAG in Railways/equivalent, or 5 years as Chief Engineer in State Govt organizations. Metro/PSU and Private Sector: Same experience criteria as above (25 years experience, 3 years as GM/equivalent top management). | Govt Organization: Officer working in SAG in Railways/equivalent, or as Chief Engineer in State Govt organizations. Metro/PSU: Minimum 20 years experience with at least 3 years as AGM in IDA pay scale Rs. 1,00,000-2,60,000 or equivalent. Private Sector: Minimum 20 years experience with at least 3 years in top management (equivalent to AGM in PSU), reporting to Director/Board. | Govt Organization: Officer in Junior Administrative Grade (JAG) in Railways/equivalent, or Executive Engineer (EE) cadre in State Govt with minimum 15 years' experience. Metro/PSU: Minimum 15 years experience with at least 4 years as DGM in IDA pay scale Rs. 80,000-2,20,000 or equivalent. Private Sector: Minimum 15 years experience with at least 4 years in senior management (equivalent to DGM in PSU). | Govt Organization: Officer with 3 years' service in Senior Time Scale (STS) in Railways/equivalent, or Chief Accounts Officer (CAO) cadre in State Govt with minimum 13 years' experience. Metro/PSU: Minimum 13 years experience with at least 4 years as Manager in IDA pay scale Rs. 70,000-2,00,000 or equivalent. Private Sector: Minimum 13 years experience with at least 4 years in middle management (equivalent to Manager in PSU). | Govt Organization: Officer in Senior Time Scale (STS) in Railways/equivalent, or Assistant Executive Engineer (AEE) cadre in State Govt with 7 years' experience. Metro/PSU: Minimum 7 years experience with at least 4 years as DM in IDA pay scale Rs. 60,000-1,80,000 or equivalent. Private Sector: Minimum 7 years experience with at least 4 years in middle management (equivalent to DM in PSU), in a company with project size of at least Rs. 200 crore or turnover of at least Rs. 50 crore in the last 3 years. | post: Qualification | chief general manager / general manager (electrical systems): B.E / B.Tech in Electrical Engineering from an AICTE/UGC approved institute | chief general manager / general manager (rolling stock): B.E / B.Tech in Electrical or ECE from an AICTE/UGC approved institute | joint general manager (architect) / manager (architect): B.Arch from an AICTE/UGC approved institute (M.Arch preferred) | deputy general manager (finance & accounts): Graduate/Postgraduate with CA/CMA from an AICTE/UGC approved institute

salary_details.details: The CMRL Recruitment 2026 drive covers a total of 7 vacancies across five post categories. The table below lists the number of posts, consolidated monthly pay, and maximum age for each post. | Note: Deputationists have the option to draw pay from their parent organization along with deputation allowance and project allowance at 10% of Basic Pay each, or draw the equivalent cadre IDA pay scale in CMRL along with IDA, HRA, and Cafeteria Allowance (31.5% of Basic Pay).

selection_process: The CMRL selection process for these posts consists of two stages:
Interview: Candidates are assessed on knowledge
and aptitude. Medical Examination: The first medical examination is free of cost
borne by CMRL. If a candidate requests an extension for joining

the cost of the second medical examination is borne by the candidate. Travel expenses for the medical test are borne by the candidate. Candidates who fail the medical test are not offered alternative employment.

Only shortlisted candidates will be called for an interview; merely meeting the eligibility criteria does not guarantee an interview call. CMRL reserves the right to shortlist candidates and to relax or tighten eligibility standards based on the response received.
how_to_apply: Eligible candidates must apply only through the official CMRL career portal. No hard copy or paper applications will be accepted. Follow these steps:
Visit the official CMRL career portal at careers.chennaimetrorail.org.
Register on the portal using a valid email ID. This email ID will be used for all further correspondence.
Check your registered email for a verification link and click "Verify" to authenticate your email ID.
Log in to the CMRL career page after verification.
Fill in all required details in each section of the application form.
Upload all requisite self-attested documents as listed in the notification.
Pay the applicable application fee (for contract posts) and upload the payment proof.
Review all details carefully and submit the application before the last date, 20 July 2026.

Candidates already employed in a Government or PSU organization must apply through the proper channel and email their application to [email protected], and must produce a No Objection Certificate (NOC) at the time of the interview.
important_instructions: Only Indian Nationals are eligible to apply. Age, qualification, and experience will be considered as on 01-07-2026. Contract appointments are initially for 2 years, extendable based on performance and requirement. Deputation is initially for 3 years, extendable up to 5 years. Contract employees may be considered for IDA Pay Scale after satisfactory completion of 2 years, subject to CMRL policy. Additional benefits include Medical and Personal Accident Insurance, Life Insurance, Mobile Phone reimbursement, SIM Card, and other admissible allowances as per CMRL HR policy. Higher remuneration or a higher post may be offered based on experience, interview performance, and qualifications. Incomplete applications or those without relevant supporting documents will be rejected outright. No TA/DA will be paid for attending the interview. Candidates attempting to influence the selection process will be summarily rejected and disqualified from future CMRL recruitments. CMRL reserves the right to withdraw, cancel, curtail, or increase the number of vacancies at any time without prior notice. All recruitment updates will be published only on the official CMRL website, so candidates should check it regularly.

content_sections.heading: CMRL Recruitment 2026 Overview
content_sections.text: Chennai Metro Rail Limited (CMRL) is a joint venture of the Government of India and the Government of Tamil Nadu, responsible for implementing the Metro Rail Project in Chennai. Below is a quick overview table of the CMRL Recruitment 2026 notification.

rows.details: CGM, GM, JGM (Architect), DGM (Finance & Accounts), Manager (Architect)

content_sections.heading: CMRL Recruitment 2026 Important Dates
content_sections.text: Notification Release Date: 01 July 2026 Online Application Start Date: 01 July 2026 Last Date to Submit Online Application: 20 July 2026 Eligibility (age, qualification, experience) to be reckoned as on: 01 July 2026

content_sections.heading: CMRL Recruitment 2026 Vacancy Details and Pay Scale
content_sections.text: The CMRL Recruitment 2026 drive covers a total of 7 vacancies across five post categories. The table below lists the number of posts, consolidated monthly pay, and maximum age for each post. Note: Deputationists have the option to draw pay from their parent organization along with deputation allowance and project allowance at 10% of Basic Pay each, or draw the equivalent cadre IDA pay scale in CMRL along with IDA, HRA, and Cafeteria Allowance (31.5% of Basic Pay).

content_sections.heading: CMRL Recruitment 2026 Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: CMRL has laid out separate eligibility criteria for candidates coming from Government organizations, Metro/PSU organizations, and the Private Sector. A summary is given below. Govt Organization: Officer with 5 years' service in Senior Administrative Grade (SAG) in Railways/equivalent in GoI, or 5 years as Chief Engineer in State Govt organizations. Metro/PSU: Minimum 25 years post-qualification executive experience with at least 3 years as GM in IDA pay scale Rs. 1,20,000-2,80,000 or equivalent. Private Sector: Minimum 25 years post-qualification executive experience with at least 3 years in top management reporting directly to a Director or Board, in a company with project size of at least Rs. 500 crore or turnover of at least Rs. 100 crore in the last 3 years. Govt Organization: IRSEE officer with 5 years' service in SAG in Railways/equivalent, or 5 years as Chief Engineer in State Govt organizations. Metro/PSU and Private Sector: Same experience criteria as above (25 years experience, 3 years as GM/equivalent top management). Govt Organization: Officer working in SAG in Railways/equivalent, or as Chief Engineer in State Govt organizations. Metro/PSU: Minimum 20 years experience with at least 3 years as AGM in IDA pay scale Rs. 1,00,000-2,60,000 or equivalent. Private Sector: Minimum 20 years experience with at least 3 years in top management (equivalent to AGM in PSU), reporting to Director/Board. Govt Organization: Officer in Junior Administrative Grade (JAG) in Railways/equivalent, or Executive Engineer (EE) cadre in State Govt with minimum 15 years' experience. Metro/PSU: Minimum 15 years experience with at least 4 years as DGM in IDA pay scale Rs. 80,000-2,20,000 or equivalent. Private Sector: Minimum 15 years experience with at least 4 years in senior management (equivalent to DGM in PSU). Govt Organization: Officer with 3 years' service in Senior Time Scale (STS) in Railways/equivalent, or Chief Accounts Officer (CAO) cadre in State Govt with minimum 13 years' experience. Metro/PSU: Minimum 13 years experience with at least 4 years as Manager in IDA pay scale Rs. 70,000-2,00,000 or equivalent. Private Sector: Minimum 13 years experience with at least 4 years in middle management (equivalent to Manager in PSU). Govt Organization: Officer in Senior Time Scale (STS) in Railways/equivalent, or Assistant Executive Engineer (AEE) cadre in State Govt with 7 years' experience. Metro/PSU: Minimum 7 years experience with at least 4 years as DM in IDA pay scale Rs. 60,000-1,80,000 or equivalent. Private Sector: Minimum 7 years experience with at least 4 years in middle management (equivalent to DM in PSU), in a company with project size of at least Rs. 200 crore or turnover of at least Rs. 50 crore in the last 3 years.

rows.post: Chief General Manager / General Manager (Electrical Systems)
rows.qualification: B.E / B.Tech in Electrical Engineering from an AICTE/UGC approved institute

rows.post: Chief General Manager / General Manager (Rolling Stock)
rows.qualification: B.E / B.Tech in Electrical or ECE from an AICTE/UGC approved institute
B.Arch from an AICTE/UGC approved institute (M.Arch preferred)
Graduate/Postgraduate with CA/CMA from an AICTE/UGC approved institute

content_sections.heading: CMRL Recruitment 2026 Age Limit and Age Relaxation
content_sections.text: The maximum age limit for each post is reckoned as on 01-07-2026, the date of the notification: Chief General Manager / General Manager (Electrical Systems & Rolling Stock): 55 years Joint General Manager (Architect): 43 years Deputy General Manager (Finance & Accounts): 40 years Manager (Architect): 38 years SC / SC (Arunthathiyars) / ST candidates: 5 years relaxation MBC / Denotified Communities / BC (non-Muslim) / BC (Muslim) candidates: 2 years relaxation Differently Abled Persons: up to 10 years relaxation over the prescribed limit (for direct recruitment only) Ex-Servicemen: prescribed age limit plus length of service in armed forces plus 3 years In all cases, the maximum age after cumulative relaxation cannot exceed 58 years as on the date of notification.

content_sections.heading: CMRL Recruitment 2026 Application Fee
content_sections.text: Application fee is applicable only for candidates applying for contract-type appointment (not applicable for deputation). Unreserved and Other Category candidates: Rs. 300/- (non-refundable) SC/ST candidates: Rs. 50/- (non-refundable, for processing charge) Differently Abled Persons: No application fee (only disability certificate needs to be uploaded) Fee must be paid via NEFT/UPI to the following account, and the payment receipt must be uploaded in the online application: Fee once paid is non-refundable under any circumstances, so candidates should verify their eligibility before making the payment.

content_sections.heading: CMRL Recruitment 2026 Selection Process
content_sections.text: The CMRL selection process for these posts consists of two stages: Interview: Candidates are assessed on knowledge, skills, comprehension, attitude, and aptitude. Medical Examination: The first medical examination is free of cost, borne by CMRL. If a candidate requests an extension for joining, the cost of the second medical examination is borne by the candidate. Travel expenses for the medical test are borne by the candidate. Candidates who fail the medical test are not offered alternative employment. Only shortlisted candidates will be called for an interview; merely meeting the eligibility criteria does not guarantee an interview call. CMRL reserves the right to shortlist candidates and to relax or tighten eligibility standards based on the response received.

content_sections.heading: CMRL Recruitment 2026 Documents Required
content_sections.text: Candidates must upload self-attested copies of the following documents online: Recent passport-size photograph (JPEG/PNG, max 2MB) Age proof (Birth Certificate / 10th Standard Certificate) Community Certificate Educational qualification certificates (10th, 12th, Diploma, Graduation, Post-Graduation) Experience certificates (present and previous employment) NOC / Proper Channel letter (for Govt/PSU applicants) Application fee payment proof (for contract type) Detailed Resume / Bio-data / CV Ex-Servicemen proof (if applicable) Disability Certificate (if applicable) Last 5 years' ACRs, duly attested (for deputation posts only) Vigilance clearance and Integrity Certificate (for deputation posts only) Proforma Certificate from current organization's HR (for deputation posts only) Proof of project size / turnover of the company (for private sector applicants only) Any other relevant certificates

content_sections.heading: How to Apply Online for CMRL Recruitment 2026
content_sections.text: Eligible candidates must apply only through the official CMRL career portal. No hard copy or paper applications will be accepted. Follow these steps: Visit the official CMRL career portal at careers.chennaimetrorail.org . Register on the portal using a valid email ID. This email ID will be used for all further correspondence. Check your registered email for a verification link and click "Verify" to authenticate your email ID. Log in to the CMRL career page after verification. Fill in all required details in each section of the application form. Upload all requisite self-attested documents as listed in the notification. Pay the applicable application fee (for contract posts) and upload the payment proof. Review all details carefully and submit the application before the last date, 20 July 2026. Candidates already employed in a Government or PSU organization must apply through the proper channel and email their application to [email protected] , and must produce a No Objection Certificate (NOC) at the time of the interview.

content_sections.heading: CMRL Recruitment 2026 Important Instructions
content_sections.text: Only Indian Nationals are eligible to apply. Age, qualification, and experience will be considered as on 01-07-2026. Contract appointments are initially for 2 years, extendable based on performance and requirement. Deputation is initially for 3 years, extendable up to 5 years. Contract employees may be considered for IDA Pay Scale after satisfactory completion of 2 years, subject to CMRL policy. Additional benefits include Medical and Personal Accident Insurance, Life Insurance, Mobile Phone reimbursement, SIM Card, and other admissible allowances as per CMRL HR policy. Higher remuneration or a higher post may be offered based on experience, interview performance, and qualifications. Incomplete applications or those without relevant supporting documents will be rejected outright. No TA/DA will be paid for attending the interview. Candidates attempting to influence the selection process will be summarily rejected and disqualified from future CMRL recruitments. CMRL reserves the right to withdraw, cancel, curtail, or increase the number of vacancies at any time without prior notice. All recruitment updates will be published only on the official CMRL website, so candidates should check it regularly.

faq.question: Q1. What is CMRL Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: CMRL Recruitment 2026 is an employment notification (No. CMRL/HR/CON/DEP/04/2026) released by Chennai Metro Rail Limited to fill posts of CGM, GM, JGM (Architect), DGM (Finance & Accounts), and Manager (Architect) on a contract or deputation basis.

faq.question: Q2. What is the last date to apply for CMRL Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the online application for CMRL Recruitment 2026 is 20 July 2026.

faq.question: Q3. How many vacancies are there in CMRL Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: There are a total of 7 vacancies across the posts of CGM/GM (Electrical Systems), CGM/GM (Rolling Stock), JGM (Architect), DGM (Finance & Accounts), and Manager (Architect).

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary for CMRL Recruitment 2026 posts?
faq.answer: The consolidated monthly pay ranges from Rs. 85,000 for Manager (Architect) up to Rs. 2,70,000 for Chief General Manager posts, along with other allowances as per CMRL HR policy.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application fee for CMRL Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The application fee is Rs. 300/- for Unreserved and Other Category candidates and Rs. 50/- for SC/ST candidates. It applies only to contract-type appointments and is non-refundable. There is no fee for Differently Abled Persons.

faq.question: Q6. How can I apply for CMRL Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Candidates can apply only online through the official CMRL career portal at careers.chennaimetrorail.org. No offline or hard copy applications are accepted.

faq.question: Q7. What is the maximum age limit for CMRL Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit varies by post, from 38 years for Manager (Architect) to 55 years for CGM/GM posts, with applicable age relaxation for reserved categories, subject to an overall cap of 58 years.

faq.question: Q8. Is CMRL Recruitment 2026 open to private sector candidates?
faq.answer: Yes, candidates from the private sector can apply, subject to meeting the specified years of experience and having worked in companies with the required project size or annual turnover.
